name: apicize-sample-api
description: Apicize Sample API to demonstrate functionality

scripts.postinstall: cd ./src/token && npm install && cd ../calc && npm install && cd ../image && npm install && cd ../issue-token && npm install && cd ../quotes && npm install
scripts.build-image: esbuild --bundle ./src/image/image.mjs --minify --platform=node --target=es2020 --format=esm --banner:js="import { createRequire } from 'module'; const require = createRequire(import.meta.url);" --outfile=.dist/image/lambda.mjs
scripts.build-issue-token: esbuild --bundle ./src/issue-token/issue-token.mjs --minify --platform=node --target=es2020 --format=esm --banner:js="import { createRequire } from 'module'; const require = createRequire(import.meta.url);" --outfile=.dist/issue-token/lambda.mjs
scripts.build-quotes: esbuild --bundle ./src/quotes/quotes.mjs --minify --platform=node --target=es2020 --format=esm --banner:js="import { createRequire } from 'module'; const require = createRequire(import.meta.url);" --outfile=.dist/quotes/lambda.mjs
scripts.build-calc: esbuild --bundle ./src/calc/calc.mjs --minify --platform=node --target=es2020 --format=esm --banner:js="import { createRequire } from 'module'; const require = createRequire(import.meta.url);" --outfile=.dist/calc/lambda.mjs
scripts.build: npm run build-image && npm run build-issue-token && npm run build-calc && npm run build-quotes && sam build
scripts.start: npm run build && concurrently 'node ./dynamodb-local.js' 'sam local start-api --warm-containers LAZY --env-vars env.local.json'
scripts.debug: npm run build && concurrently 'node ./dynamodb-local.js' 'sam local start-api --warm-containers LAZY -d 5858 --debug-function CalcFunction --env-vars env.local.json'
